Project.NAME: @osovv/vv-opencode
Project.keywords: opencode, plugins, workflow, model-roles, hashline-edit, work-items, controller
Project.annotation: Portable OpenCode workflow package with plugins, a Bun CLI for install, sync, semantic model-role assignment, hash-anchored editing, managed controller routing, explicit work-item protocol, and cross-device setup.

M-MODEL-ROLES.NAME: ModelRoles
M-MODEL-ROLES.purpose: Define built-in role IDs, `vv-role:*` syntax, concrete model-selection parsing, canonical role assignment normalization, shared role resolution helpers, and built-in role bindings for managed agents and OpenCode defaults.

const-BUILTIN_ROLE_NAMES.PURPOSE: Canonical built-in semantic roles: default, smart, fast, vision.

const-ROLE_REFERENCE_PREFIX.PURPOSE: Stable `vv-role:` prefix used by shared workflow config.

fn-isRoleReference.PURPOSE: Detect whether a model string uses the semantic role syntax.

fn-parseModelSelection.PURPOSE: Parse `provider/model[:variant]` used by canonical role assignments.

fn-resolveRoleReference.PURPOSE: Resolve a `vv-role:*` reference against the canonical role map and return a concrete model selection.

fn-getBuiltInRoleBindings.PURPOSE: Return hard-coded built-in role bindings for OpenCode defaults and managed agents.

M-CONFIG-LAYERS.NAME: ConfigLayers
M-CONFIG-LAYERS.purpose: Resolve vvoc and OpenCode configuration sources across explicit environment overrides, nearest project-local layers, global layers, and built-in defaults, plus canonical project/global write targets.

const-VVOC_CONFIG_ENV.PURPOSE: Explicit vvoc config file override used by runtime and launch.

const-OPENCODE_CONFIG_ENV.PURPOSE: Explicit OpenCode config file override used by diagnostics and launch.

fn-findNearestProjectConfigRoot.PURPOSE: Walk upward from cwd and find the nearest ancestor containing .vvoc/vvoc.json or .opencode/opencode.json(c).

fn-resolveConfigWriteTargets.PURPOSE: Return canonical global or project write paths; project scope writes .opencode/opencode.json and .vvoc/vvoc.json.

fn-resolveVvocConfigSource.PURPOSE: Resolve vvoc config source metadata for global, project, or effective reads.

fn-resolveOpenCodeConfigSource.PURPOSE: Resolve OpenCode config source metadata for global, project, or effective reads.

fn-loadVvocConfig.PURPOSE: Load the effective vvoc config once for runtime plugins, returning the same startup promise and immutable snapshot on all matching calls.

M-CLI-CONFIG.NAME: OpenCodeConfigTools
M-CLI-CONFIG.purpose: Layer-aware OpenCode/vvoc config mutation with strict current schema v3 parsing, pinned plugin registration, role-reference writes for root OpenCode model fields, managed `default_agent`, built-in `explore`, current managed agents, local skill path registration, canonical vvoc schema v3 rendering with required plugins and built-in role presets, and diagnostic installation inspection.
M-CLI-CONFIG.path: src/lib/opencode.ts + src/lib/config-layers.ts + src/lib/package.ts + src/lib/vvoc-config.ts + src/lib/vvoc-preset-registry.ts + src/lib/model-roles.ts + src/lib/vvoc-paths.ts + schemas/vvoc/v3.json
M-CLI-CONFIG.depends: M-CONFIG-LAYERS, M-MODEL-ROLES, M-VVOC-PRESET-REGISTRY, M-CLI-MANAGED-AGENTS, M-CLI-MANAGED-SKILLS, M-CLI-AGENT-MODELS

fn-resolvePaths.PURPOSE: Resolve OpenCode and vvoc paths using canonical global or project-local layers.

fn-ensurePackageInstalled.PURPOSE: Add the pinned vvoc package specifier to the OpenCode plugin array if needed.

fn-syncManagedAgentRegistrations.PURPOSE: Ensure OpenCode config keeps root defaults, `default_agent: vv-controller`, built-in `explore`, current vvoc-managed OpenCode agent registrations, tools.apply_patch=false, and local managed skill discovery path on canonical values while leaving old unrelated agent/command entries untouched.

fn-parseVersionedVvocConfigText.PURPOSE: Strictly parse vvoc.json as current schema v3, including required plugins, and reject unsupported or incomplete legacy shapes.

fn-syncVvocConfig.PURPOSE: Rewrite the selected vvoc.json document only after strict-reading a valid current config, preserving user-owned role assignments and plugin toggles while refreshing managed `vv-*` role presets.

fn-inspectInstallationForScope.PURPOSE: Inspect status/doctor sources using global, project, or effective layered source selection and report invalid vvoc config diagnostics without repair.

M-RELEASE-AUTOMATION.NAME: ReleaseAutomation
M-RELEASE-AUTOMATION.purpose: Guard npm releases with a local version-bump wrapper, mandatory AI-generated changelog summary, schema `$id` consistency check, latest changelog summary validation, and tag-gated GitHub Actions publish workflow.

script-release-check.PURPOSE: Verify package identity/version, hosted vvoc schema `$id`, config format version, and latest changelog entry ### Summary before release.

script-release-bump.PURPOSE: Wrap `npm version --no-git-tag-version`, generate mandatory AI release changelog summary with `opencode --pure run` from changelog, commit metadata, and full per-commit diffs, inject `### Summary` into changelog, patch schema `$id`, run consistency checks, commit package/schema changes, and create a `vX.Y.Z` tag.

script-release-summary.PURPOSE: Provide deterministic helpers for release summary model config, commit metadata plus full per-commit diff collection, prompt construction, OpenCode JSONL parsing, summary envelope validation, retry orchestration, changelog injection, and latest changelog summary validation. Used by both release-bump and release-check.

workflow-publish.PURPOSE: Publish to npm only from `v*` tags after tag/package consistency and package quality checks pass.

M-CLI-MANAGED-AGENTS.NAME: ManagedAgents
M-CLI-MANAGED-AGENTS.purpose: Define bundled guardian, vv-controller, enhancer, vv-implementer, vv-spec-reviewer, vv-code-reviewer, and investigator prompt templates plus managed agent metadata, including built-in role bindings for managed OpenCode agent registrations.

const-MANAGED_OPENCODE_AGENTS.PURPOSE: Canonical managed OpenCode agent definitions used for vv-controller, enhancer, and tracked subagent registration.

fn-loadManagedAgentPromptTemplate.PURPOSE: Load a bundled prompt template for a managed vvoc agent.

M-CLI-MANAGED-SKILLS.NAME: ManagedSkills
M-CLI-MANAGED-SKILLS.purpose: Define bundled vv-spec, vv-plan, vv-review, vv-execute, and vv-reflect skill templates plus managed skill metadata for file path resolution, bundled template loading, reference file discovery, and project/global skill lookup.

const-MANAGED_SKILL_NAMES.PURPOSE: Canonical vvoc-managed skill names: vv-spec, vv-plan, vv-review, vv-execute, vv-reflect.

fn-loadManagedSkillTemplate.PURPOSE: Load a bundled skill template for a managed vvoc skill.

fn-listManagedSkillReferenceFiles.PURPOSE: List bundled reference files for managed vvoc skills.

M-CLI-AGENT-MODELS.NAME: AgentModels
M-CLI-AGENT-MODELS.purpose: Define supported vvoc model target IDs and shared model override validation helpers.

const-SPECIAL_AGENT_NAMES.PURPOSE: Target IDs that use provider/model syntax in canonical vvoc config.

const-OPENCODE_DEFAULT_MODEL_TARGETS.PURPOSE: Target IDs that map to top-level OpenCode model fields.

const-CONFIGURABLE_OPENCODE_AGENTS.PURPOSE: Built-in OpenCode agent IDs that vvoc can map to model fields.

fn-isSpecialAgentName.PURPOSE: Checks whether a target uses Guardian-style model syntax.

fn-normalizeModelTargetOverride.PURPOSE: Validates and canonicalizes a stored model override string for any supported target.

fn-formatAgentModel.PURPOSE: Formats a model string for CLI output.

M-PLUGIN-TOGGLE-CONFIG.NAME: PluginToggleConfig
M-PLUGIN-TOGGLE-CONFIG.purpose: Define the canonical plugin toggle names, the `plugins` section shape in vvoc.json, default-all-true values, and a pure `isPluginEnabled()` helper over an already-loaded vvoc config snapshot.

const-PLUGIN_TOGGLE_NAMES.PURPOSE: Canonical list of vvoc-managed plugin names: guardian, hashline-edit, model-roles, system-context-injection, workflow, secrets-redaction.

fn-createDefaultPluginToggleConfig.PURPOSE: Return a Record<string, boolean> with all known plugins set to true.

fn-isPluginEnabled.PURPOSE: Return whether the named plugin is enabled from a loaded vvoc config object. Default to true if the specific plugin toggle is absent.

M-CLI-COMMANDS.NAME: VVOCCommands
M-CLI-COMMANDS.purpose: Compose the `vvoc` CLI and expose init, install, sync, launch, status, doctor, version, plugin list/toggle, config validate, role, preset, patch-provider, completion, guardian config, and upgrade commands for layered project/global config usage.

export-init.PURPOSE: Bootstrap package registration and role-based config scaffolding (interactive by default).

export-sync.PURPOSE: Refresh managed vvoc config files plus role-reference OpenCode root defaults, built-in `explore`, local skill paths, and managed agents in global or project scope.

export-launch.PURPOSE: Spawn opencode with OPENCODE_CONFIG and VVOC_CONFIG set to effective, project, or global config sources.

M-PLUGIN-MODEL-ROLES.NAME: ModelRolesPlugin
M-PLUGIN-MODEL-ROLES.purpose: Resolve `vv-role:*` references in OpenCode root model fields plus agent and command definitions during plugin config hooks using effective vvoc config source precedence.

export-ModelRolesPlugin.PURPOSE: Config-hook plugin that resolves `vv-role:*` references for supported OpenCode config fields.

M-CLI-ROLE.NAME: RoleCommand
M-CLI-ROLE.purpose: List semantic role assignments from global/project/effective vvoc config and set/unset assignments in global or project vvoc config for built-in and user-defined roles.

fn-listRoles.PURPOSE: Render built-in and custom role assignments from selected global/project/effective vvoc config.

fn-setRole.PURPOSE: Write a normalized concrete model assignment for a role to global or project vvoc config.

fn-unsetRole.PURPOSE: Remove a custom role assignment from global or project vvoc config while protecting built-in roles.

cmd-role.PURPOSE: vvoc role list|set|unset --scope global|project|effective - CLI command for semantic role management.

M-CLI-PRESET.NAME: PresetCommand
M-CLI-PRESET.purpose: List/show declarative named role presets from global/project/effective vvoc config and apply presets to global or project vvoc config without rewriting OpenCode config directly.

fn-resolvePreset.PURPOSE: Validate a preset name against the selected vvoc.json preset map.

fn-applyPreset.PURPOSE: Apply only the listed role assignments through global or project vvoc config writes.

cmd-preset.PURPOSE: vvoc preset <name> --scope global|project - CLI command for declarative multi-role model switching.

M-VVOC-PRESET-REGISTRY.NAME: VvocPresetRegistry
M-VVOC-PRESET-REGISTRY.purpose: Define the canonical managed vvoc preset registry so config seeding, sync refresh, and shell completion names share one internal source of truth.

const-BUILTIN_VVOC_PRESET_REGISTRY.PURPOSE: Canonical built-in preset definitions for vv-openai, vv-zai, vv-minimax, and vv-deepseek.

const-BUILTIN_VVOC_PRESET_NAMES.PURPOSE: Deterministic built-in preset name order reused by config writes and completion output.

fn-isBuiltinVvocPresetName.PURPOSE: Check whether a preset name is one of the managed built-in vvoc presets.

M-PLUGIN-GUARDIAN.NAME: GuardianPlugin
M-PLUGIN-GUARDIAN.purpose: Review OpenCode permission requests using a constrained hidden Guardian subagent whose runtime model resolves from the built-in `fast` role in the effective strict-current vvoc config source, then reply through the current OpenCode permission API or current HTTP reply fallback.

export-GuardianPlugin.PURPOSE: Register Guardian hooks for config, events, tool intent capture, and permission review via a hidden subagent.

M-PLUGIN-HASHLINE-EDIT.NAME: HashlineEditPlugin
M-PLUGIN-HASHLINE-EDIT.purpose: Replace OpenCode's default `edit` tool with a current hash-anchored variant and rewrite `read` output to stable `line#hash#anchor|content` rows so stale or old-algorithm edits are rejected before file corruption.

export-HashlineEditPlugin.PURPOSE: Register the hash-anchored `edit` tool override plus a post-read output enhancer that emits `line#hash#anchor|content` rows.

M-PLUGIN-SYSTEM-CONTEXT-INJECTION.NAME: SystemContextInjectionPlugin
M-PLUGIN-SYSTEM-CONTEXT-INJECTION.purpose: Inject reusable system guidance and workflow protocol instructions into primary chat sessions, including repository-memory lookup guidance for .vvoc lessons and runbooks, while registering skill discovery paths according to effective config scope and skipping known subagents.

export-SystemContextInjectionPlugin.PURPOSE: Inject main-session system guidance such as proactive explore instructions, repository-memory lookup, and workflow protocol without polluting known subagents.

M-PLUGIN-SECRETS-REDACTION.NAME: SecretsRedactionPlugin
M-PLUGIN-SECRETS-REDACTION.purpose: Redact secrets from messages before LLM requests and restore them after, loading redaction settings from the effective vvoc config source.

export-SecretsRedactionPlugin.PURPOSE: Main plugin factory for chat-message redaction, completion restoration, and tool-argument restoration.

M-WORKFLOW-PROTOCOL.NAME: WorkflowProtocol
M-WORKFLOW-PROTOCOL.purpose: Parse and validate VVOC_WORK_ITEM_ID, VVOC_STATUS, and VVOC_ROUTE protocol fields from tracked subagent output, define allowed statuses per agent type, and report protocol errors.

type-TrackedAgentName.PURPOSE: Union type for tracked subagent names: vv-implementer, vv-spec-reviewer, vv-code-reviewer.

type-VVocStatus.PURPOSE: Union type for allowed VVOC_STATUS values per agent.

type-ParsedResultBlock.PURPOSE: Structured top-block parse result with workItemId, status, optional route.

fn-parseResultBlock.PURPOSE: Parse the strict top block from a tracked subagent output string.

fn-validateStatusForAgent.PURPOSE: Validate that a parsed status is allowed for the given tracked agent.

fn-parseWorkItemHeader.PURPOSE: Extract VVOC_WORK_ITEM_ID from the first line of a tracked subagent prompt.

const-TRACKED_SUBAGENT_NAMES.PURPOSE: Ordered list of tracked subagent names.

M-WORKFLOW-REPAIR.NAME: WorkflowRepair
M-WORKFLOW-REPAIR.purpose: Recognize resumable OpenCode task-result envelopes, build strict repair prompts, and resume the same child session once to repair malformed tracked workflow outputs when safe.

type-ResumableTaskEnvelope.PURPOSE: Recognized resumable OpenCode task wrapper metadata plus inner tracked result text.

fn-unwrapResumableTaskResult.PURPOSE: Extract inner tracked result text only from known resumable OpenCode task envelopes.

fn-buildTrackedResultRepairPrompt.PURPOSE: Construct the one-shot repair prompt for the same tracked child session.

fn-attemptTrackedResultRepair.PURPOSE: Resume the same child session once and return repaired tracked result text when available.

M-WORKFLOW-STATE.NAME: WorkflowState
M-WORKFLOW-STATE.purpose: In-memory work-item state store with explicit workflow intent, required reviewer roles, collect-all review-round metadata, launch-time in-flight tracking, result-time aggregation, counter tracking, ready_to_close close gating, optional closed-item listing keyed by (sessionId, workItemId), and file-backed persistence via hydrate/snapshot delegate.

type-WorkItemState.PURPOSE: Union of all work-item lifecycle states.

type-WorkItemMode.PURPOSE: Explicit workflow intent: implementation or review_only.

type-ReviewerRole.PURPOSE: Domain reviewer role IDs: spec and code.

type-ReviewRound.PURPOSE: Current review-round required, pending, in-flight, completed, and result metadata.

type-WorkItemRecord.PURPOSE: Full work-item state record with explicit intent, counters, current round, and metadata.

fn-createWorkItemStore.PURPOSE: Create a new scoped in-memory work-item store.

fn-openWorkItem.PURPOSE: Create or return an existing work item by idempotency key.

fn-getWorkItem.PURPOSE: Retrieve a work item by ID.

fn-listWorkItems.PURPOSE: List session work items with optional closed-item inclusion.

fn-beginTrackedLaunch.PURPOSE: Validate a tracked launch and mark reviewers in flight.

fn-applyTrackedResult.PURPOSE: Apply parsed tracked output, record reviewer results, and aggregate full review rounds.

fn-getReviewRound.PURPOSE: Compute the current review round from spec and code review counters.

M-WORKFLOW-TRANSITIONS.NAME: WorkflowTransitions
M-WORKFLOW-TRANSITIONS.purpose: Deterministic explicit-intent launch policy, reviewer role mapping, collect-all review-round settlement, mode-specific aggregate state resolution, and implementation retry loop-gate enforcement.

fn-getAllowedNextAgents.PURPOSE: Return all tracked agents currently allowed for an explicit work item.

fn-isAllowedTransition.PURPOSE: Check whether launching a specific tracked agent is valid for a work item.

fn-resolveCompletedRoundState.PURPOSE: Resolve mode-specific lifecycle state after a full review round settles.

fn-shouldBlockRound.PURPOSE: Check whether the current review round exceeds the allowed limit.

M-WORKFLOW-TOOLING.NAME: WorkflowTooling
M-WORKFLOW-TOOLING.purpose: Custom tool definitions for work_item_open, work_item_list, and work_item_close that wrap the in-memory state store.

fn-createWorkItemOpenTool.PURPOSE: Create the work_item_open custom tool handler.

fn-createWorkItemListTool.PURPOSE: Create the work_item_list custom tool handler.

fn-createWorkItemCloseTool.PURPOSE: Create the work_item_close custom tool handler.

M-PLUGIN-WORKFLOW.NAME: WorkflowPlugin
M-PLUGIN-WORKFLOW.purpose: Register workflow tools, enforce tracked subagent launch validation via tool.execute.before, unwrap OpenCode task result envelopes before tracked result parsing, attempt one bounded same-session repair for malformed resumable tracked outputs via tool.execute.after, inject workflow protocol guidance into eligible orchestrating primary sessions such as vv-controller via chat.message, and hydrate/snapshot work-item state from/to per-session persistence files through event hooks.
M-PLUGIN-WORKFLOW.depends: M-WORKFLOW-PROTOCOL, M-WORKFLOW-REPAIR, M-WORKFLOW-STATE, M-WORKFLOW-TRANSITIONS, M-WORKFLOW-TOOLING, M-WORKFLOW-PERSISTENCE, M-CLI-MANAGED-AGENTS

export-WorkflowPlugin.PURPOSE: Main plugin factory that registers workflow tools, launch enforcement, result parsing, event-driven persistence, and primary-session guidance.

M-WORKFLOW-PERSISTENCE.NAME: WorkflowPersistence
M-WORKFLOW-PERSISTENCE.purpose: Hydrate and snapshot work-item workflow state from/to per-session JSON files under $XDG_DATA_HOME/vvoc/workflow/<sessionId>/workflow-state.json, treating missing, corrupt, or incomplete state as fail-closed empty state.

fn-hydrateWorkflowState.PURPOSE: Read and parse the per-session workflow-state.json, return WorkItemStoreData or null.

fn-snapshotWorkflowState.PURPOSE: Write WorkItemStoreData to the per-session workflow-state.json.

M-CLI-CONFIG-VALIDATE.NAME: ConfigValidate
M-CLI-CONFIG-VALIDATE.purpose: Validate canonical strict-current vvoc.json against the role-based vvoc JSON Schema v3, including the required plugins section, with human-readable error reporting.

fn-validateVvocConfigContent.PURPOSE: Validate vvoc.json content and report schema violations with line/column.

fn-validateVvocConfigFile.PURPOSE: Validate vvoc.json and report schema violations.

cmd-config_validate.PURPOSE: vvoc config validate - CLI command for role-based config validation.

M-CLI-PLUGIN-LIST.NAME: PluginList
M-CLI-PLUGIN-LIST.purpose: Display all installed OpenCode plugins with enabled/disabled status and source paths.

fn-listPlugins.PURPOSE: Scan OpenCode config and return plugin entries.

cmd-plugin_list.PURPOSE: vvoc plugin list - CLI command for listing plugins.

M-CLI-PLUGIN-TOGGLE.NAME: PluginToggle
M-CLI-PLUGIN-TOGGLE.purpose: Add `vvoc plugin enable <name>` and `vvoc plugin disable <name>` subcommands that mutate the `plugins` section in the selected vvoc.json.

fn-enablePlugin.PURPOSE: Set plugins[<name>] = true in the selected vvoc.json.

fn-disablePlugin.PURPOSE: Set plugins[<name>] = false in the selected vvoc.json.

notes.note-1: Validates plugin name against PLUGIN_TOGGLE_NAMES before writing.

M-CLI-PATCH-PROVIDER.NAME: PatchProvider
M-CLI-PATCH-PROVIDER.purpose: Apply global OpenCode patch presets such as the `stepfun-ai` baseURL override, the `zai` provider model patch, and the OpenAI alias-model patch that installs vv-managed xhigh aliases such as `openai/vv-gpt-5.5-xhigh` for role assignment use without rewriting root OpenCode model fields.

fn-resolvePatchProviderPreset.PURPOSE: Validate supported patch preset names and map them to concrete OpenCode provider-object writes.

fn-applyPatchProviderPreset.PURPOSE: Resolve the global OpenCode config path and apply the selected preset without mutating root role-reference defaults.

cmd-patch_provider.PURPOSE: vvoc patch-provider stepfun-ai|zai|openai - CLI command for global OpenCode patch presets.

M-CLI-COMPLETION.NAME: Completion
M-CLI-COMPLETION.purpose: Auto-detect the current shell, install completion files idempotently, and generate bash/zsh/fish completion content including patch-provider presets, preset names, role subcommands, and built-in role ids.

fn-detectShell.PURPOSE: Detect the active shell from environment variables.

M-CLI-INIT.NAME: Init
M-CLI-INIT.purpose: Interactive project setup with prompts for scope and initial configuration, seeding canonical built-in roles plus role-reference OpenCode root defaults, built-in `explore`, and managed agent registrations. Uses @clack/prompts.

cmd-init.PURPOSE: vvoc init - CLI command for project initialization.

M-CLI-UPGRADE.NAME: Upgrade
M-CLI-UPGRADE.purpose: Check npm for updates, install the latest global package with Bun, and run post-install sync from a fresh subprocess while reporting sync failure as an explicit partial upgrade.

fn-runUpgradeFlow.PURPOSE: Execute the full upgrade flow, including Bun global install and partial-upgrade warning handling when post-install sync fails.

cmd-upgrade.PURPOSE: vvoc upgrade - CLI command for globally upgrading vvoc and then running sync.
